name: Oatmeal Butter Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Stir together the flour, oats, salt, and sugar in a large bowl or in the food processor until combined.
3. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
4. Blend in enough of the milk to form a dough that will hold together in a cohesive ball.
5. Divide the dough into 2 equal portions for rolling.
6. On a floured surface or pastry cloth, roll as thin as possible, to about 1/16 inch thick.
7. Using a spatula, rolling pin, or your hands, transfer the rolled dough gently onto a large baking sheet.
8. With a sharp knife, score the dough into 2-inch squares without cutting all the way through the dough.
9. Prick each square 2 or 3 times with the tines of a fork.
10. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, turning over after 15 minutes, until crisp.
11. Cool on a rack. Break into individual crackers when cool.
Yield: 50-60
